tasks.subject: Task 1: Plumb user role through admin user CRUD DTOs and service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `role` is required on create/update, returned on read, and persisted — all existing tests still pass and the new round-trip is covered.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/dto/AdminUserRequest.java
- Modify: backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/dto/AdminUserResponse.java
- Modify: backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserService.java
- Modify: backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserServiceTest.java
- Modify: backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest.java

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AdminUserRequest has @NotNull AppUser.Role role
- AdminUserResponse exposes role
- create sets role from request
- update sets role from request (no guards yet)
- All existing tests still pass (constructor signatures updated)
- New tests cover role round-trip

**Verify:** cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=AdminUserServiceTest,AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/dto/AdminUserRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/dto/AdminUserResponse.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserService.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserServiceTest.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=AdminUserServiceTest,AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AdminUserRequest has required role", "AdminUserResponse exposes role", "create persists role", "update sets role (no guards)", "existing tests updated and passing", "new role round-trip tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add self-edit and last-admin guards to AdminUserService.update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Block self-edit of role and block demoting the last admin. Both guards run only when the role is actually changing.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/AppUserRepository.java
- Modify: backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserService.java
- Modify: backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserController.java
- Modify: backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserServiceTest.java
- Modify: backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest.java

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AppUserRepository.countByRole(Role) added
- AdminUserService.update(id, request, currentAdminId) is the new signature
- Self-edit guard throws StateConflictException when role changes and id == currentAdminId
- Last-admin guard throws StateConflictException when demoting last ADMIN
- Guards do not run when role is unchanged
- Controller passes @AuthenticationPrincipal AppUser id through
- Five new unit tests cover the guards

**Verify:** cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=AdminUserServiceTest,AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest,AdminAuthorizationIntegrationTest

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/AppUserRepository.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserService.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserController.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserServiceTest.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=AdminUserServiceTest,AdminUserControllerIntegrationTest,AdminAuthorizationIntegrationTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["countByRole added", "self-edit guard", "last-admin guard", "guards skipped when role unchanged", "controller threads currentAdminId", "unit tests for both guards"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Surface mutation errors in AdminFormModal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When a create/update mutation in any admin CRUD page fails, the error message returned by the server is shown inside the form modal.

**Files:**
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/admin/hooks/useAdminCrud.js
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/admin/components/AdminFormModal.jsx
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/admin/components/AdminCrudPage.jsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- useAdminCrud exposes saveError
- saveError clears when form opens
- AdminFormModal renders saveError as soft red banner above buttons
- AdminCrudPage passes saveError through
- Other admin pages unchanged when no error

**Verify:** cd frontend && npm run lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/admin/hooks/useAdminCrud.js", "frontend/src/pages/admin/components/AdminFormModal.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/admin/components/AdminCrudPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["saveError exposed by hook", "saveError cleared on open", "modal renders error banner", "page wires it through"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Role column, role select, and lag note in AdminUsersTable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admins can see who is an admin and edit any user's role. When changing role on edit, an inline note explains the up-to-15-minute propagation lag.

**Files:**
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/admin/components/AdminFormModal.jsx (add dynamicHint)
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUsersTable.jsx
- Modify: frontend/src/locales/en/admin.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Role column with purple Admin pill
- Required Role select (User/Admin) on create/edit, default User
- Lag note appears when role select differs from initial value (edit only)
- All strings via t() in admin namespace
- Manual: demoting last admin shows 409 banner
- Manual: promoting a user works end-to-end

**Verify:** cd frontend && npm run lint && manual verification per plan steps

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/admin/components/AdminFormModal.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUsersTable.jsx", "frontend/src/locales/en/admin.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["role column with badge", "role select with default USER", "lag note on role change in edit", "all strings i18n", "manual: 409 banner visible", "manual: promote works"]}
```
